mapper.select: select namespace from monitor_microservice_namespace where del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, id asc
select id, namespace, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from monitor_microservice_namespace where namespace = #{namespace} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into monitor_microservice_namespace (namespace, sort_order, del_flag, create_by, create_time) values (#{namespace}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, '0', #{createBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update monitor_microservice_namespace set del_flag = '2', update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = sysdate() where del_flag = '0'
update monitor_microservice_namespace set del_flag = '0', sort_order = #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, update_by = #{updateBy, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = sysdate() where id = #{id}
